meta.title: Prof. Sushkov S.V. — Surgical Oncologist | MARIA Medical Center, Kharkiv
meta.description: Prof. Sergiy Valentinovich Sushkov — surgical oncologist with 40+ years of experience. Laparoscopy, oncology, gynecology. MARIA Medical Center, Kharkiv, Ukraine.

hero.title: Professor-level Surgery, Oncology & Gynecology
hero.subtitle: MD, PhD, DSc, Prof. Sushkov S.V. — 40+ years experience, 5000+ operations. Individual approach, modern equipment, safe surgery.

doctor_profile.name: Professor Sergiy Valentinovich Sushkov
doctor_profile.credentials: MD, PhD, DSc, Professor | Surgical Oncologist | EAES Member
doctor_profile.bio: Pioneer of laparoscopic surgery in the Kharkiv region (1995–1997). Deputy Director for Research at the V.T. Zaitsev Institute of General and Emergency Surgery (NAMS of Ukraine) for 22 years. 121 publications, 18 patents, h-index 6. Leading surgeon, surgical oncologist, consultant at MARIA Medical Center.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Modern surgery, oncology, and gynecology
services.surgery_desc: Laparoscopy, minimally invasive surgery. Gallbladder removal, appendicitis, hernias, and other operations.
services.oncosurgery_desc: Treatment of gastric, intestinal, breast, and female organ cancers. Early detection and comprehensive therapy.
services.gynecology_desc: Professor-level consultation, pregnancy planning, treatment of female diseases, prevention.
services.myomectomy_desc: Uterine fibroid removal with organ preservation. Pregnancy planning after surgery.
services.diagnostics_desc: Screening, early cancer detection. Ultrasound, mammography, colposcopy, laboratory tests.
services.checkup_desc: Medical examinations, certificates, comprehensive screening. Preventive diagnostics.

why_us.title: Why Choose MARIA?
why_us.subtitle: MARIA Medical Center is a team of highly qualified specialists with many years of experience.
why_us.professor_desc: Doctors with academic degrees and many years of practice. Continuous professional development.
why_us.equipment_desc: Laparoscopic tower, expert-class ultrasound, modern laboratory.
why_us.safety_desc: Gentle minimally invasive methods, short rehabilitation period, comfortable rooms.
why_us.comprehensive_desc: From diagnosis to rehabilitation — full treatment cycle under one team's supervision.

about_page.title: Professor Sergiy Valentinovich Sushkov
about_page.subtitle: MD, PhD, DSc, Professor | Surgical Oncologist | EAES Member | 40+ Years Experience
about_page.timeline_1986: Graduated from Kharkiv Medical Institute (now KhNMU). Began career as a surgeon.
about_page.timeline_1995: Pioneer of laparoscopic surgery in the Kharkiv region. First laparoscopic cholecystectomy, splenectomy, cryovagotomy performed.
about_page.timeline_1998: PhD defense. Topic: cryosurgery and role of H. pylori in gastric oncogenesis. Established H. pylori — carcinoma correlation.
about_page.timeline_2007: DSc defense. Topic: "Surgical treatment of multiple gastric and duodenal ulcers."
about_page.timeline_2007_2026: Professor at Department of Surgery №1, KhNMU. Deputy Director for Research at V.T. Zaitsev Institute of General and Emergency Surgery.
about_page.timeline_2026: Surgeon and Oncological Surgeon at LLC "MARIA Medical Center". Continuation of clinical and scientific work.
about_page.education_text: Kharkiv Medical Institute (1986) — diploma with honors, specialty "General Medicine"
about_page.degrees_text: PhD (1998) — cryosurgery & H. pylori; DSc (2007) — multiple ulcers; Professor — KhNMU
about_page.qualifications_text: General Surgery, Oncological Surgery, Vascular Surgery, Thoracic Surgery, Healthcare Management — all highest category
about_page.certifications_text: GCP (Good Clinical Practice) — 20+ years. EAES. Ukrainian Association of Surgeons. Ukrainian Association of Minimally Invasive Surgery.
about_page.clinical_lead: 15+ international multicenter clinical trials as Principal Investigator (PI).
about_page.membership_uamis: Ukrainian Association of Minimally Invasive Surgery

articles_page.subtitle: Expert materials on health, diagnostics, and treatment by Prof. Sushkov S.V.

articles_page.article_2_excerpt: Treatment of gastric, intestinal, breast, and female organ cancers.
articles_page.article_3_excerpt: Prevention and treatment of gynecological diseases. Pregnancy planning.
articles_page.article_4_excerpt: Uterine fibroid removal with organ preservation. Pregnancy possible after surgery.
articles_page.article_5_excerpt: Early cancer detection: ultrasound, mammography, colposcopy, laboratory tests.
articles_page.article_6_excerpt: Regular check-ups for women. Prevention and early disease detection.
